author: Yitebeier Aikebaier
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Private proof of existence for your notes. Hash locally, anchor to Bitcoin via OpenTimestamps, verify offline. Your content never leaves your machine; only a hash is published.

name: Sealmark

releases.author: jdh847
releases.description: Maintenance release. Status bar styling via CSS class, deprecated substr fixed, dependency lock updated. Plugin behaviour unchanged from 0.0.1.

releases.author: jdh847
releases.description:
Initial release of Sealmark.

Private proof of existence for your notes: hash locally, anchor to Bitcoin via OpenTimestamps, verify offline. Your content never leaves your machine; only a hash is published.

Desktop only. Requires Obsidian 1.4.0+.
